titleStmt.title: SII 41.464: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 464. (A.R. No. 678 of 1905.) Tiruvēḍagam, Nilakkōṭṭai Taluk, Madura District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Patrikāparamēśvara temple at Tiruvēḍagam.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya, Māravarman Sundara-Pāṇḍya I, Year 4+1+1 = 1221 A.D.

summary.p: Built in at the beginning. The king gave order fixing the annual remuneration (śrīkāṟiyappēṟu), as 30 kalam of paddy and one achchu, to be given from the temple to śrīkāriyam officer, upon the request made by Chembiyaṉ Viḻupparaiyaiṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
poru ceyamaṭantai yun tāmaraikkuvimulaic ceyappuyattiruppa vetanāvil veḷḷitaḷ tāmaraik kātalmātu kaviṉpeṟat tiḷaippa veṇṭiraiyuṭutta maṇṭiṇik kiṭa
yiṟ kaḷippac camaiyanitiyun tarumamun taḻaippa yimaiyavar viḻākkoṭi yiṭantoṟumeṭuppa karuṅkali kaṉalkeṭak kaṭavuḷ vetiyararuntoḻil veḻvic ceṅkaṉal parappi
kulavap porutiṟalāḻi pūtalañcūḻa vorukaiyiruk cevimummatanāṟkoṭṭayirāvata mutal ceytira koṟṟat teṇṭicai yāṉaiyerutta meṟikkaṇṭa nāṭemateṉak kayalkaḷikūra pocala
(la)r māḷuvar makatar(m) poppaḷam puṇṭaraṅ kaliṅkamiḻaṅ kaṭāraṅkavuṭam teliṅkañciṉa mutalāy vitimuṟai tikaḻa vevveṟuvakuttu mutunilakkiḻamai muṭipuṉai
ventar tirumuṭicūṭic ceṅkoloccik koṟṟattāḷak kuḷirkuṭai niḻaṟkiṭkaṟṟaik kavarikāvalar vīcaviṭaikatir navamaṇi virasimhāsaṉattuṭaṉ muṭicūṭiyuyarkulattiruveṉa
pārtipar maṅkayar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅkuñ ceṉṉic cuṭaroḷi mavulimeliṭac civanta Iṇaimalaṟ ciṟaṭikkamalamatukaraṅkamalameṉṟaṇuku mulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷ Oṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷi
ya komutal komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīsundrapāṇṭiyadevaṟku yāṇṭu ṉālāvataṉetirāmāṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭikku tirumukappaṭi
ṟattut tevatāṉam tiruveṭakattu Uṭaiyār tiruveṭakamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil śrīrudra śrīmāheśvararkku Innāyaṉār koyil śrīkāryañ ceyyum mavaṉukku śrīkāriyap peṟunāḷ Oṉṟu
kkukuṟuṇi Āka Āṇṭoṉṟukku nellu muppatiṉkalamum Āṇṭoṉṟukkuk kuṭukkum Accu Oṉṟum Ippaṭi Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu cempiyaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil yā
ṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu Aṟpaci māsam mutal Āṇṭoṉṟukku Ikkoyil kālāl nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellukkuṟuṇi Āka Āṇṭoṉṟukku nellu muppatiṉ kalamum Ivvaccu Oṉṟum kuṭukka Ippaṭi
liluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Ivai miḻalaikkūṟṟattu naṭuvilk kūṟṟattut tuñcalūr Īrāḻiyuṭaiyāṉ maṉavācakaṅkaṭantāṉ tam(ā)rākkiyāṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiya viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu
Iṉnāyaṉār koyil śilpācāryaṉ Āṇṭāṉ sarveśvaramuṭaiyāṉāṉa śilpādhi rājaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 41.464 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
